rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that the public lemma `antipode_convMul_id` is in the `TauCeti.HopfAlgebra` namespace inside `FunctorOfPoints.lean`, a genuine placement mismatch confirmed by the diff — it is used only once internally (line 129), so making it `private` resolves the namespace pollution cleanly. Review 1 misses this real, easily-fixed placement issue.
